name: plausiden-forge
description: MCP tool surface for the PlausiDen ecosystem (Forge / Loom / Crawler). Cross-AI consumable per `[[priority-architectural-first-and-cross-ai]]` — Claude / Gemini / other agents read identical schemas. Mount this via your client's MCP integration to get typed access to the substrate's audit + build + doctrine + content + journey tools.
doctrine_references: docs-008 — structured JSON output across platform tools
tool-starvation-anti-pattern — reach for substrate tools before bash/grep

categories.session_start: Reach for these at the start of any work session.
categories.doctrine: Read + cite the AVP-Doctrine rule database.

agent_guidance.first_action: Call forge_orient at session start for affordance inventory + scoped doctrine rules.
agent_guidance.before_writing_code: Call forge_doctrine_for with the target path to learn which rules govern the change.
anti_patterns: Do not hand-roll JSON-RPC wrappers around forge subcommands — the typed schemas in tools/ are canonical.
Do not add Claude-specific extensions to a tool's input schema — preserve cross-AI parity.
Do not duplicate command help text in tool descriptions — link to TOOLS.md and the cited doctrine rule.
Do not add a new tool without updating manifest.json + AGENTS.md + TOOLS.md in the same commit.
